quote: Freeing yourself was one thing, claiming ownership of that freed self was another.
author: Toni Morrison

quote: Never mistake activity for achievement.
author: John Wooden

quote: Everything changes and nothing stands still.
author: Heraclitus

quote: If you're going through hell, keep going.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: When I let go of what I am, I become what I might be.
author: Lao Tzu

quote: Every action you take is a vote for the type of person you wish to become.
author: James Clear

quote: Fear is a natural reaction to moving closer to the truth.
author: Pema Chödrön

quote: I do not know the way to defeat others, but the way to defeat myself.
author: Yagyū Munenori

quote: Vulnerability is not weakness; it's our greatest measure of courage.
author: Brené Brown

quote: Freedom is not something that anybody can be given; freedom is something people take, and people are as free as they want to be.
author: James Baldwin

quote: Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like work.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Sell your cleverness and buy bewilderment. Cleverness is mere opinion, bewilderment intuition.
author: Rumi

quote: The secret of life is to fall seven times and to get up eight times.
author: Paulo Coelho

quote: It is not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
author: Epictetus

quote: Whatever you can do or dream you can, begin it. Boldness has genius, power and magic in it.
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quote: That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quote: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
author: George Eliot

quote: The unexamined life is not worth living.
author: Socrates

quote: Waking up this morning, I smile. Twenty-four brand new hours are before me. I vow to live fully in each moment.
author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quote: The greatest weapon against stress is our ability to choose one thought over another.
author: William James
